title: Use local Tactus path dependency in Plexus for end-to-end local validation

comments.author: derek.norrbom
comments.text: Implementing local-only dependency override in pyproject.toml by replacing pinned tactus==0.44.0 with a local file reference to /Users/derek.norrbom/Projects/Tactus for end-to-end local CC Python validation.

comments.author: derek.norrbom
comments.text: Completed file edit in pyproject.toml: tactus dependency now points to local path URI (tactus @ file:///Users/derek.norrbom/Projects/Tactus). Ready for local install validation.

comments.author: derek.norrbom
comments.text: Completed: updated pyproject.toml to use local Tactus dependency for local end-to-end validation ().
